persona.name: Consistent Morning Mover
persona.description: Someone who moves their body first thing, before the day has a chance to talk them out of it.

milestones.title: Run a 5K without stopping
milestones._comment: 20 of 21 — checking this off during the take completes it on camera

action.title: Move for 20 minutes
action.anchorLink: After I put my shoes by the bed
action.kickstartVersion: Six squats and six push-ups — that counts

action.title: Phone on the charger by 10:30
action.anchorLink: After the last dish is done
action.kickstartVersion: Just plug it in — you can pick it back up

_comment_history: missDaysAgo = every action missed that day (red on the calendar — proves 'a missed day never erases you'). partialDaysAgo = only the first scheduled action done (amber). Today is deliberately left unlogged so the demo can complete it on camera.

notes.6: Nearly skipped it — did the short version instead

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Consistent Morning Mover doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

reflections.userInput: I'm ready for my weekly review.
reflections.aiFeedback: You showed up on four of five days last week — that's the Consistent Morning Mover doing exactly what they do. Let's protect what's working.

onboardingAnswers: I keep restarting the same fitness goal every January and dropping it by February.
Mornings are the only time nobody else needs me. But I can't do an hour.
